controls.text: New here? Learn how exchange works
New here? Learn how exchange works

runtime.bodyPreview:
NEX ↔ USDT EXCHANGE
Convert NEX to USDT (or back) at live market rate.
Move between Nexion's platform token and the dollar-pegged stablecoin in your wallet. Daily caps and KYC tiers protect both you and the platform.
Why a built-in exchange?
Your earnings come in two forms — USDT (stablecoin you can withdraw) and NEX (platform token used for rewards and discounts). Most users want to convert NEX into USDT to eventually cash out. This page lets you do that instantly at the live market price.
How to make a swap (3 steps)
The whole flow takes under 30 seconds.
1
Pick direction and amount
Choose whether you're paying with NEX or USDT, then enter how much. The other side updates live with the rate quoted. You'll see a 15-second quote window — refresh anytime.
2
Review and confirm
Confirm the am

controls.text: How to make a swap (3 steps)

1
Pick direction and amount
Choose whether you're paying with NEX or USDT, then enter how much. The other side updates l

2
Review and confirm
Confirm the amount you'll receive at the locked rate. Network fee is free for in-platform swaps — n

3
Funds settle instantly
Once submitted, both balances update in your wallet on the next frame. No waiting period — the
What happens if I hit a cap?

1.
Your swap request enters the platform queue, ranked by time submitted.

2.
On the next-day reset (00:00 UTC), queued swaps process in order at that day's locked rate.

3.
If you cancel before processing, the locked NEX/USDT returns to your wallet untouched.

runtime.bodyPreview:
FOUNDERS TIER
250% APY · 24-Month Founders Vault
Lock your NEX for 24 months at 250% APY. Payout streams via continued network royalty distribution — Founders-tier exclusive.
APY
250%
Lock-up
24 mo
Min lock
1,000 NEX
Founders Vault — invite only
Founders Vault opens to senior account holders. Your account is eligible after sustained network activity. Continue building your network — you'll be notified when access opens.
Founders track
How the Vault works
1. NEX is moved from your wallet into a locked balance — you cannot withdraw or swap during the 24-month lock.
2. Vault yield accrues monthly at simple 250% APY. Statements posted to /me/wallet/bills.
3. At maturity, principal + accrued yield is released to your spendable NEX balance in one transaction.

PREMIUM
Founders-tier perks · monthly subscription
Lock in priority job routing, 24/7 VIP support, and an extra +2% NEX yield on every device — for as long as you stay subscribed.
Premium launching soon
Premium subscription is rolling out in waves. Your account will be invited based on activity and tenure — keep your fleet active to move up the list.
Invitations rolling out
Premium is a monthly perk pack. The +2% NEX bonus is applied at settlement time on every paid order in your network. Subscription is independent of staking and network royalty.

runtime.bodyPreview:
RE-INVEST BOOST
Lock USDT for 90 days — earn 4 things at once.
Re-invest is a single deposit that stacks staking interest, contribution points, cultivation multiplier, and a Genesis lottery ticket. Like compound interest, but on steroids.
What is Re-invest Boost?
Think of Re-invest as a power-up version of regular staking. You commit USDT for 90 days, and instead of just earning interest, you simultaneously unlock four separate rewards — each useful for a different part of the platform.
It's the platform's way of rewarding users who keep their money working in the ecosystem rather than withdrawing it immediately. The compound effect is why "re-investing" earnings can grow faster than holding cash idle.
Four rewards in one deposit
Every re-invest deposit triggers all four simultaneously.
⚡
